description: Intelligent autonomous facility inspections. Utilize Digital Twins, continuous LiDAR anomaly detection, and predictive maintenance via Edge AI on confined multi-rotor platforms.
learning_objectives: Understand the types of industrial facilities and their critical inspection needs
Build and train AI models for detecting anomalies: thermal hotspots, corrosion, leaks, structural defects, and equipment malfunctions
Create geospatial and time‑series data pipelines for tracking asset health over time
Deploy optimized models on edge hardware for real‑time anomaly detection during flights
Implement automated reporting and integration with CMMS (Computerized Maintenance Management Systems)
Design safe inspection flight paths in hazardous environments (GPS‑denied, confined spaces)
Comply with industrial safety regulations (OSHA, ATEX for explosive atmospheres)

modules.title: Confined Space Flight Autonomy
modules.description: Navigate complex, dark, and highly reflective indoor environments using advanced sensor fusion.
topics: Collision tolerance and cage design aerodynamics
Edge lighting enhancement via Low-Light Image Enhancement Generative Networks

modules.title: Ultrasonic & NDT Sensor Integration
modules.description: Integrate drones with Non-Destructive Testing (NDT) payloads to measure wall thickness and structural integrity in industrial tanks.
topics: Corrosion segmentation and grading via Deep Learning
Real-time defect mapping onto CAD models

capstone_project.name: Autonomous Solar Farm Inspection Drone
capstone_project.description: Build and test a drone system that autonomously inspects a solar farm (or simulated layout). The drone must fly a pre‑planned grid, capture RGB and thermal images, detect panels, identify hot cells, and generate a maintenance report with panel coordinates and thermal images. Achieve >95% recall for hot cells (temperature >10°C above ambient) and <5% false positives.
deliverables: Trained thermal anomaly detection model (quantized, <100 MB)
ROS 2 nodes for flight planning, anomaly detection, and reporting
HIL simulation report with performance metrics
Safety plan for operating near electrical equipment

resources.name: FLIR Thermal Dataset for Solar Panels
OSHA Safety Standards for Drone Operations

glossary.definition: Non-Destructive Testing. Analysis techniques used to evaluate properties of a material, component, or system without causing damage.
An odometry technique estimating motion in a full 360-degree field of view to prevent blind spots in confined spaces.
